use_cases: Website navigation menus requiring hover animations
Responsive header navigation for landing pages
Mobile-friendly hamburger menu with smooth transitions
Minimalist site navigation with hover state feedback
ai_summary: A responsive navigation menu component featuring hover effects on menu items with smooth color transitions from dark text to white text on hover. Includes a mobile hamburger menu toggle with animated icon transformation. Designed with a minimalist aesthetic using a light gray background and clean sans-serif typography, adapting seamlessly between desktop horizontal layout and mobile vertical stack.
